this is still happening -- I send a message in the agent harness -- it's correctly published in the session's channel and it immediately comes back in the next hook use as an injeted message! We need a PROPER solution so this kind of thing doesn't continue to happen! Research a plan, implement, PR+merge it

Researched and implemented a fix (PR #43, merged) for the message re-injection issue by recovering the origin session from local storage to properly filter echoes. Tests pass (264/264), though CI has pre-existing rustfmt issues unrelated to this change.
